mapper.select: SELECT deck_id AS deckId, slot, card_id AS cardId FROM deck_entry WHERE deck_id = #{deckId} ORDER BY slot
SELECT de.card_id AS cardId, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS copies FROM deck_entry de INNER JOIN deck d ON d.id = de.deck_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY de.card_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deck_entry (deck_id, slot, card_id) VALUES (#{deckId}, #{slot}, #{cardId})
mapper.select: SELECT de.deck_id AS deckId, de.slot AS slot, de.card_id AS cardId FROM deck_entry de INNER JOIN deck d ON d.id = de.deck_id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND de.card_id = #{cardId} ORDER BY de.deck_id, de.slot LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE deck_entry SET card_id = #{cardId} WHERE deck_id = #{deckId} AND slot = #{slot}
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) FROM deck_entry WHERE deck_id = #{deckId} AND card_id = #{cardId}
